summary: Tested mobile responsiveness (Tenants, Invoices, Create Invoice) and Draft Invoice feature end-to-end (backend + frontend). All acceptance criteria passing.
passed: Backend: POST /api/invoices with is_draft=true + partial data (only tenant + electricity_start) returns 200 with status='draft' and DRAFT-* serial_number
Backend: GET /api/invoices/{id} returns draft with nullable fields (rent/electricity_end/water_price = null)
Backend: GET /api/invoices/{id}/pdf on draft returns 400 with message 'Cannot generate PDF for draft invoice. Please finalize the invoice first.'
Backend: PUT /api/invoices/{id} with is_draft=false + full fields finalizes draft -> status='pending', serial changes DRAFT-* to INV-YYYYMM-####, total computed correctly
Backend: month/year remain required on InvoiceCreate (matches model spec) - draft still saves with these + any other partial subset
Frontend mobile (375x667) - Tenants: card view visible (md:hidden), table hidden
Frontend mobile (375x667) - Invoices: card view visible, table hidden
Frontend desktop (1920x1080) - Tenants + Invoices tables visible; draft row shows blue 'Draft' badge
Create Invoice page: 'Save Draft' button present alongside 'Buat Tagihan' (Save Draft disabled until tenant selected)
Invoice detail (draft): shows DRAFT badge, nullable fields render as '-', 'Edit Draft' button present, 'Unduh PDF (Draft)' button disabled
Edit Draft page (/invoices/edit/{id}): loads with pre-filled partial data (Meteran Awal=200), tenant locked ('Tenant cannot be changed'), 'Update Draft' + 'Finalize Invoice' buttons present
Finalize validation: clicking 'Finalize Invoice' with incomplete required fields shows error 'Please fill in all required fields to finalize invoice'
notes: Auth is cookie-based (not bearer token). Draft POST requires month & year (by model); other billing fields are optional as designed. All 10 acceptance criteria from the review request pass.
